channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: No 82 woodbank rd, 22nd May
item.description:
Number 82 woodbank rd (woodbank house) which is an HMO still leaving their bins & rubbish all over the street lots of cardboard boxes just left outside this is a regular occurrence
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodbank Road, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Can this tree be inspected please?, 22nd May
item.description:
If dead can it be removed, stump ground out and noted for replanting asap - in the next planting season

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mainridge Road, Chislehurst
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: 3 Riney yellow plastic work barriers remain on footway over a week after completion of repairs - two barriers in Newlands Park and one 4 metres away around the corner in Lennard Rd, Penge., 22nd May
item.description:
3 Riney yellow plastic work barriers remain on footway over a week after completion of repairs - two barriers in Newlands Park and one 4 metres away around the corner in Lennard Rd, Penge.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Newlands Park, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Excess litter, 22nd May
item.description:
The broadway shopping center outside area is always disgusting and there is an excess amount of litter.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Arnsberg Way, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near to 1 Newlyn Road, 22nd May
item.description:
2 car mats have been dumped in roadway, been there for many weeks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newlyn Road, Falconwood, Greater London

item.title: Uneven paving 55 - 57 Elmstead Ave, 22nd May
item.description:
Could this be inspected please?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmstead Avenue, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The metal slides steps for young children, 21st May
item.description:
Today I visited the park on main road St Paul’s recreation which is our closest park! And my son had a fall and sliced his forehead! The park itself is not fit or kitted out for young children even though you have equipment that you think is fit! The park equipment is so dated and has not been updated for years! Personally the whole park needs modernising to suit/fit the needs of the children in the area. You have 2 primary schools, 3 nurseries and a special needs school and it’s not fit for purpose. If any of the equipment have been broken it’s never been fully replaced it’s just been fixed, it’s a complete danger zone! The fact my 2 year was able to do this it’s clear it’s not fit for purpose. You need to do a full revamp/design of this park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Main Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Social gatherings late at night, littering, public urination, 21st May
item.description:
There have been social gatherings of people drinking and smoking in the evenings late into the night on Gillet Street. They push their way through the gate that leads to private residences and become very aggressive. Man urinating in private drive.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gillett Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on side walk at start of The Avenue, 21st May
item.description:
Litter scattered on side pavement at start of The Avenue. Please help clean up.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Page Heath Villas, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tagging, 21st May
item.description:
Tagging

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Halifax Road, Enfield

item.title: This is a broken pavement stone outside 24 Shad Thames, 21st May
item.description:

item.title: Road marking on junction of ashcroft Avenue and ashcroft crescent, 21st May
item.description:
Road marking have worn away to the point the where i have witnessed too many near misses as people do not realise the priority of the roads. I reported this in September last year but still unresolved.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ashcroft Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Laziness, 21st May
item.description:
Pull your finger out, lazy binmen.. Pull your finger out

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): High Street, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of building waste, 21st May
item.description:
More heavy bricks and masonry dumped by the bin on Rowhill Rd. This is an almost daily occurrence and becoming increasingly frustrating and upsetting. Can we please have some proper enforcement to prevent this from continuing.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clarence Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Unwanted Plastic Containers Dumped on Pavement, 21st May
item.description:
Two large unwanted plastic containers have been left dumped on the pavement outside number 86. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Amount of Rubbish Dumped on Path, 21st May
item.description:
A large amount of rubbish has been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burrage Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
